reviews.title: Easy choice for the neighborhood
reviews.text: Our trip brought us to Nobu Hotel Chicago for two nights. The Yubune King, 439 sq ft matched the listing and made a clear first impression. The concierge and front desk made the stay feel well managed. Being close to transit saved time, especially when crossing town. Overall, I would stay again for the convenience and comfort.

reviews.title: Polished stay
reviews.text: I stayed at Nobu Hotel Chicago during a visit with our student in Chicago. We could reach most plans without thinking too hard about transportation. I liked the hotel, but I would compare prices carefully before booking again. Service was polished without feeling stiff, especially at check-in. Overall, I would stay again for the convenience and comfort.

reviews.title: Strong city stay
reviews.text: I stayed at Nobu Hotel Chicago during a remote-work stay. The concierge and front desk made the stay feel well managed. We could reach most plans without thinking too hard about transportation. Breakfast was better than expected and helped before a packed day. I left feeling the stay did what I needed it to do.

reviews.title: Comfortable and convenient
reviews.text: I stayed at Nobu Hotel Chicago during a couples trip. The hotel details, including sauna, steam room, indoor pool, fitness center and two restaurants, gave the stay a polished feel. The internet was usable for messages but unreliable for streaming or calls. Breakfast was a pleasant start, with enough options before heading out. The concierge and front desk made the stay feel well managed.

reviews.title: Comfortable and convenient
reviews.text: Our trip brought us to Nobu Hotel Chicago for two nights. We tried the Japanese and Asian restaurant, which made it convenient to stay close in the evening. The final price felt high once parking and extras were included. Service was polished without feeling stiff, especially at check-in. For a city stay, the hotel worked very well.

reviews.title: Strong city stay
reviews.text: I stayed at Nobu Hotel Chicago during a business trip. Hallway noise was minimal, and we slept without interruptions. The room felt clean when we arrived, and the bathroom looked freshly serviced. I left feeling the stay did what I needed it to do.

reviews.title: Convenient but not perfect

We liked having a real breakfast option on-site instead of searching early. The room blocked city noise better than I expected. The positives outweighed the drawbacks, but the hotel is not perfect.

The location helped, but the stay did not fully meet expectations.
